name: banque-app
description: Banque app — backend Express/MySQL + frontend React/Vite (déploiement unifié)

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build:frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
